scripts.regtest: pnpm -r build && pnpm -r lint && pnpm -C apps/web run a11y:e2e:regtest
scripts.regtest:full: pnpm -r build && pnpm -r lint && pnpm -C apps/web run a11y:e2e:full
scripts.deploy:email-functions: pnpm email:bundle && supabase functions deploy send-auth-email --no-verify-jwt && supabase functions deploy send-otp-email && supabase functions deploy send-notification
scripts.deploy:payment-functions: pnpm email:bundle && supabase functions deploy confirm-mock-payment --no-verify-jwt && supabase functions deploy handle-payment-event && supabase functions deploy create-checkout --no-verify-jwt && supabase functions deploy prepare-enrolment-checkout --no-verify-jwt && supabase functions deploy get-enrolment-completion --no-verify-jwt && supabase functions deploy handle-payment-document --no-verify-jwt && supabase functions deploy admin-resend-document && supabase functions deploy verify-grow-credentials --no-verify-jwt && supabase functions deploy verify-icount-credentials --no-verify-jwt
scripts.secrets:email: node scripts/sync-email-secrets.mjs && pnpm exec supabase secrets set --env-file supabase/.temp/email-secrets.env
